title: tragia leonis
intro: Tragia leonis, also known as the lion's tragia or wild spinach, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragia leonis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or ointment for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
